name: dev-loop
description: Autonomous multi-agent SDLC loop — eight agents (PM/QA/Dev/Sweep/Reflect/Ops/Architect/Director) coordinated entirely through ticket state.

plugins.name: dev-loop
plugins.description: Eight autonomous agents that run a software-development loop coordinated through ticket state — Linear (default), a machine-local file board, or a local node:sqlite hub (per-agent identity, web UI/daemon, discussion board, Lark/Slack channel, one-way Linear mirror; CLI-portable). See README + docs/HUB-ARCHITECTURE.md.
